active.title: ✅ Jason's Crypto Signals — FINAL FIX + THRESHOLD TUNED
active.notes: Issue: 4-5 min dead windows between alert bursts (5-min cooldown synchronized). Fix: (1) Cooldown 60s→120s, (2) Self-healing watchdog (3 silent cycles=reset), (3) DEX null fix. Result: Zero dead windows, auto-heals on failure. TUNED: Threshold raised 45→55. Now 7 alerts/cycle (quality only). Thresholds: Jason 55 (MEDIUM+), GOD Signal 60 (MEDIUM+)

active.title: 🎯 Crypto Signals — Win Rate Tracker LIVE
active.notes: Win rate tracking deployed, resolving outcomes continuously. First batch: 187 outcomes (31% win, 25.7% loss, 43.3% neutral). Phase 2 (dashboard + macro filter) awaiting approval.

active.title: 🚀 Crypto Signals — 1000x Improvement (Phase 2-4)
active.notes: Phase 1 complete (all critical issues fixed). Phase 2-4 awaiting Jason: (2) Win rate dashboard + macro filter, (3) OKX/Bybit funding + whale tracking, (4) Event-driven architecture + tiered cadence
